source_jobs.title: Research Scientist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

ATG (Autonomous Technologies Group) is an AI lab deploying frontier reasoning systems within financial markets.

Founders: Early GPU cloud (9 figure exit).

Investors: Garry Tan / YC + Founder of one of the most successful quant funds, BoxGroup (Plaid, Ramp, Stripe), top-tier angels.



About the Role

You’ll drive original research at the boundaries of AI, working on new models, algorithms, and architectures for reasoning in complex environments. Your work will shape the scientific agenda of the lab and inform everything we build. You’ll have autonomy to pursue fundamental research and see your ideas deployed in real-world settings.

Responsibilities

 - Formulate and explore open questions in deep learning, reinforcement learning, and agent-based AI.

 - Develop novel architectures, algorithms, and theoretical insights.

 - Collaborate with engineers to implement, experiment, and iterate rapidly.

 - Publish, present, and contribute to the broader research community.

 - Mentor and support the next generation of technical talent.

Requirements

 - Demonstrated track record of impactful AI/ML research (e.g., papers, open-source, or novel deployments).

 - Deep expertise in at least one of: LLMs, RL, agent-based systems, generative modeling, theory of intelligence.

 - Strong mathematical background (probability, optimization, statistics).

 - Proficiency in Python and modern ML frameworks (e.g., PyTorch, JAX).

 - Ability to turn theory into robust, practical code.

 - Up-to-date on the latest research in LLMs from reading papers, articles, or re-implementing breakthroughs.

 - Expertise in leveraging the latest AI tools (Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, etc) to increase productivity & code output while maintaining high code quality, maintainability, and structure.



Why Join ATG

We're building a small, elite team. If you're excited by AI, markets, and building from first principles, we’d love to meet you.

 - Work on AI with a massive market opportunity

 - Early team of repeat founders backed by top investors

 - High agency, talent dense, zero bureaucracy

source_jobs.title: Member of Technical Staff (Research Engineering)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

ATG (Autonomous Technologies Group) is an AI lab deploying frontier reasoning systems within financial markets.

Founders: Early GPU cloud (9 figure exit).

Investors: Garry Tan / YC + Founder of one of the most successful quant funds, BoxGroup (Plaid, Ramp, Stripe), top-tier angels.



About the Role

You’ll bridge research and engineering—rapidly implementing, experimenting with, and scaling new algorithms and models. You’ll work closely with scientists and founders to translate ideas into high-performance systems, and will operate across the stack from prototyping to deployment.

Responsibilities

 - Prototype and scale experimental models (LLMs, RL agents, agentic systems) on large, real-world data.

 - Build tools and pipelines for training, evaluation, and analysis.

 - Implement state-of-the-art research from papers and iterate in collaboration with scientists.

 - Own the full ML lifecycle: data engineering, experimentation, training, and deployment.

 - Operate in a highly autonomous, engineering-driven environment.

Requirements

 - Strong background in deep learning, reinforcement learning, or computational modeling.

 - Expert-level Python and significant experience in ML frameworks (PyTorch, JAX, TensorFlow).

 - Ability to translate research into robust, scalable systems.

 - Experience with distributed computing or large-scale ML pipelines.

 - Demonstrated curiosity and hands-on experimentation skills.

 - Expertise in leveraging the latest AI tools (Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, etc) to increase productivity & code output while maintaining high code quality, maintainability, and structure.



Why Join ATG

We're building a small, elite team. If you're excited by AI, markets, and building from first principles, we’d love to meet you.

 - Work on AI with a massive market opportunity

 - Early team of repeat founders backed by top investors

 - High agency, talent dense, zero bureaucracy

source_jobs.title: Member of Technical Staff (Backend)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

ATG (Autonomous Technologies Group) is an AI lab deploying frontier reasoning systems within financial markets.

Founders: Early GPU cloud (9 figure exit).

Investors: Garry Tan / YC + Founder of one of the most successful quant funds, BoxGroup (Plaid, Ramp, Stripe), top-tier angels.



About the Role
You’ll architect, build, and maintain the distributed systems, APIs, and backend infrastructure that power world-class AI research and deployment. Your work will enable rapid experimentation, robust data flows, and scalable compute. This is a hands-on role for someone who thrives in small, high-agency teams.

Responsibilities

 - Design and implement scalable backend services, data pipelines, and APIs

 - Build infrastructure for high-throughput, low-latency AI/ML workflows

 - Set up and manage databases (SQL/NoSQL), including schema design, replication, indexing, and performance optimization

 - Optimize for performance, reliability, and security at every layer

 - Implement observability best practices (logging, tracing, monitoring, performance tuning)

 - Work closely with research and infra teams to support experimental velocity

 - Contribute to core engineering culture, including code reviews and mentorship

Requirements

 - 3+ years building distributed systems or high-availability backends (preferably in fast-moving or high-stakes environments)

 - Strong proficiency in Python and at least one systems language (e.g., Go, Rust, C++)

 - Experience with cloud platforms, containerization, and orchestration (AWS/GCP/Azure, Docker, Kubernetes)

 - Database setup, management, and optimization experience (SQL/NoSQL)

 - Relentless focus on code quality, correctness, and performance

 - Comfortable leveraging modern AI coding tools (Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, etc.) to increase productivity & code output while maintaining high code quality, maintainability, and structure

Bonus – Agentic workflows / applied AI integration

 - Experience supporting or integrating agentic AI workflows into backend systems (e.g., LangChain, LangGraph, Semantic Kernel, Haystack, or custom frameworks)

 - Familiarity with persistence/checkpointing, streaming pipelines, and vector/knowledge store integrations



Why Join ATG

We're building a small, elite team. If you're excited by AI, markets, and building from first principles, we’d love to meet you.

 - Work on AI with a massive market opportunity

 - Early team of repeat founders backed by top investors

 - High agency, talent dense, zero bureaucracy

source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

ATG (Autonomous Technologies Group) is an AI lab deploying frontier reasoning systems within financial markets.

Founders: Early GPU cloud (9 figure exit).

Investors: Garry Tan / YC + Founder of one of the most successful quant funds, BoxGroup (Plaid, Ramp, Stripe), top-tier angels.



About the Role

You’ll design and scale the compute, storage, and data infrastructure that powers advanced AI research. Your work will ensure the speed, reliability, and reproducibility of every experiment and deployment.

Responsibilities

 - Develop and maintain scalable compute infrastructure (cloud, bare metal, clusters).

 - Automate build, test, and deploy pipelines for research and production.

 - Build tools for experiment tracking, monitoring, and reproducibility.

 - Ensure security, reliability, and rapid iteration across all environments.

Requirements

 - Deep experience with cloud-native platforms (AWS, GCP, OCI), containerization, and orchestration (Kubernetes, Docker).

 - Strong proficiency in Python and infrastructure-as-code tools (Terraform, Ansible, etc.).

 - Experience scaling infra for ML, data, or research workflows.

 - Relentless focus on reliability, observability, and developer velocity.

 - Expertise in leveraging the latest AI tools (Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, etc) to increase productivity & code output while maintaining high code quality, maintainability, and structure.



Why Join ATG

We're building a small, elite team. If you're excited by AI, markets, and building from first principles, we’d love to meet you.

source_jobs.title: Member of Technical Staff (Full Stack)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

ATG (Autonomous Technologies Group) is an AI lab deploying frontier reasoning systems within financial markets.

Founders: Early GPU cloud (9 figure exit).

Investors: Garry Tan / YC + Founder of one of the most successful quant funds, BoxGroup (Plaid, Ramp, Stripe), top-tier angels.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You’ll build core user interfaces, APIs, and backend infrastructure. You’ll operate across the stack: designing, shipping, and maintaining everything from frontend product experiences to backend services that power strategy, data, and operations. This role is ideal for someone who likes shipping end-to-end, cares about craft, and enjoys working in a small team with high ownership.



RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Design, build, and maintain frontend applications (web and/or mobile) and backend APIs powering core product experiences.

 - Work closely with research/quant and product teams to turn investment logic, simulations, and data pipelines into reliable product surfaces.

 - Build internal dashboards, tools, and data visualizations for monitoring portfolios, experiments, and operational workflows.

 - Own features end-to-end: architecture, implementation, testing, deployment, observability, and iteration.

 - Maintain high standards for code quality, usability, reliability, and performance.

 - Improve developer velocity through good systems: CI/CD, tooling, clear interfaces, and pragmatic documentation.


REQUIREMENTS

 - 3+ years experience as a full stack engineer (startup, product team, or high-ownership environment).

 - Strong skills in modern JavaScript/TypeScript frameworks (e.g., React, Next.js) and backend development (Python, Node, Go, etc.).

 - Experience building, testing, and deploying production web applications.

 - Experience designing and integrating APIs (REST and/or GraphQL), plus strong understanding of data modeling and system boundaries.

 - Solid fundamentals: debugging, performance, and reliability in real-world systems.

 - Ability to work autonomously, prioritize well, and thrive in a fast-moving, research-driven culture.

 - Comfort leveraging modern AI coding tools (Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, etc.) to increase output while maintaining maintainability and structure.

 - (Optional) Experience with mobile development (React Native, Swift, Kotlin, Flutter).

 - (Optional) Experience with financial systems, portfolio data, or high-stakes UX.



Why Join ATG

We're building a small, elite team. If you're excited by AI, markets, and building from first principles, we’d love to meet you.

 - Work on AI with a massive market opportunity

 - Early team of repeat founders backed by top investors

 - High agency, talent dense, zero bureaucracy

source_jobs.title: Member of Technical Staff (iOS)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

ATG (Autonomous Technologies Group) is an AI lab deploying frontier reasoning systems within financial markets.

Founders: Early GPU cloud (9 figure exit).

Investors: Garry Tan / YC + Founder of one of the most successful quant funds, BoxGroup (Plaid, Ramp, Stripe), top-tier angels.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a software engineer to help develop, launch, and maintain the first version of the ATG iOS app. This is a zero-to-one role: you’ll own the mobile experience end-to-end, from architecture to polish. Your work will directly shape how users interact with ATG, shaping the future of mobile AI experiences. As a key member of our team, you'll push the boundaries of iOS development, combining technical excellence with design finesse. From pixel-perfect UI to smooth animations and thoughtful micro-interactions, you’ll create seamless, motion-driven experiences that delight users. If you excel in building high-quality, intuitive, and visually stunning apps, this role is for you.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Architect and ship our first iOS app—from private beta to App Store release.

 - Implement core features with fluid UI, high performance, and scalable client infrastructure.

 - Collaborate closely with the founders, product, and design on prototyping, and product direction.

 - Build testing pipelines (unit tests, CI/CD) to keep reliability high while moving fast.

 - Deploy platform-level improvements (real-time syncing, on-device ML, efficient data flow).

 - Iterate quickly on new iOS experiences that make AI useful, intuitive, and delightful in every user’s pocket.

 - Prioritize performance, reliability, and responsiveness to deliver best-in-class mobile experiences.


HOW WE WORK

We’re early, fast, and ambitious. Every engineer has a direct line to product decisions and user impact. We optimize for:

 - User delight — clean, intuitive, responsive experiences.

 - Speed with quality — ship quickly without cutting corners on reliability.

 - High impact — focus on features that move the needle for users.

 - Collaboration — work directly with founders in a flat, high-trust environment.


REQUIREMENTS

 - 3+ years of hands-on iOS experience (Swift, UIKit/SwiftUI, Combine, concurrency).

 - Shipped at least one app to the App Store and evolved it based on real-user feedback.

 - Comfortable shipping fast while maintaining quality (modular design, unit tests, CI, profiling).

 - Resourceful: you choose the right tools, work lean, and thrive without heavy scaffolding.

 - Strong product sense: you care about UX and sweat the details.

 - Clear communicator—whether debugging, brainstorming, or shifting gears under pressure.

 - Strong design sensibility and an eye for detail—experience working closely with UI/UX designers to create polished, high-quality mobile experiences.

 - Expertise in leveraging the latest AI tools (Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, etc) to increase productivity & code output while maintaining high code quality, maintainability, and structure.


BONUS IF YOU’VE…

 - Experience integrating ML models on-device or in-app.

 - Built dual-platform experiences (iOS + Android or iOS + Web).

 - Led iOS architecture: modular features, performance tuning, advanced debugging.



Why Join ATG

We're building a small, elite team. If you're excited by AI, markets, and building from first principles, we’d love to meet you.

 - Work on AI with a massive market opportunity

 - Early team of repeat founders backed by top investors

 - High agency, talent dense, zero bureaucracy

source_jobs.title: Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

ATG (Autonomous Technologies Group) is an AI lab deploying frontier reasoning systems within financial markets.

Founders: Early GPU cloud (9 figure exit).

Investors: Garry Tan / YC + Founder of one of the most successful quant funds, BoxGroup (Plaid, Ramp, Stripe), top-tier angels.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for a product designer to help design, build, and ship the Autonomous product experience. This is not a traditional design role: you'll use agentic coding tools like Claude Code to rapidly prototype ideas and build real product experiences, collapsing the distance between concept and shipped product. Your work will shape how people first encounter Autonomous and how they experience it every day, from the brand to the product itself. You'll learn from a tenured team while pushing your own craft forward. From product UX to brand campaigns to marketing materials, you'll move fluidly across surfaces with a bias for speed, taste, and invention. If you thrive in ambiguity, learn fast, and care deeply about craft, this role is for you.


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Design and ship core product experiences, from private beta to App Store release.

 - Use AI-powered tools to rapidly prototype and build working product experiences, not just mockups.

 - Create marketing materials: videos, images, landing pages, and campaign assets that communicate what Autonomous is and why it matters.

 - Help develop the brand direction: visual identity, motion language, and creative voice as we scale.

 - Collaborate closely with founders, product designers, and engineers on product direction and prototyping.

 - Explore widely and iterate quickly to make useful, intuitive, and delightful experiences for our users.

 - Maintain high craft across everything you touch: typography, spacing, color, motion, and the details that make experiences feel considered.


HOW WE WORK

We're early, fast, and ambitious. Every person has a direct line to product decisions and user impact. We optimize for:

 - User delight — clean, intuitive, premium experiences that earn trust.

 - Speed with taste — ship quickly without cutting corners on craft.

 - Building as thinking — the best way to evaluate an idea is to make it real.

 - Collaboration — work in a flat, high-trust environment.


REQUIREMENTS

 - Based in NYC and excited to work onsite. We build better when we're in the same room.

 - 2-3 years of product design experience (or equivalent personal projects demonstrating exceptional craft and initiative).

 - Shipped real work: apps, websites, campaigns, side projects.

 - Strong visual craft. You care about typography, spacing, color, motion, and the details that separate good from great.

 - Comfortable in Figma and excited to use AI tools (Claude Code, Codex, Nano Banana, Midjourney) to prototype and build.

 - Able to move between product design and brand/marketing work without losing quality in either.

 - High-agency. You don't wait for permission, you try things, show your work, and iterate.

 - Resilient. Not every idea will work. You're energized by exploration, not defeated by dead ends.

 - Clear communicator, whether presenting work, taking feedback, or shifting gears under pressure.

 - Expertise in leveraging the latest AI tools to increase creative output while maintaining high quality, craft, and coherence.


BONUS IF YOU'VE...

 - Designed for AI-native products.

 - Created video content, motion graphics, or brand campaigns.

 - Built a design blog, side project, or creative portfolio that shows range beyond your day job.



Why Join ATG

We're building a small, elite team. If you're excited by AI, markets, and building from first principles, we’d love to meet you.

 - Work on AI with a massive market opportunity

 - Early team of repeat founders backed by top investors

 - High agency, talent dense, zero bureaucracy

notes: AI lab with strong engineering focus, recent YC investment
